name: make it winter
steer: Recast the whole scene in deep winter: frost, snow and bare branches, breath-fogging cold air, a pale low sun and long blue shadows. Shift the palette to icy blues, frosted whites and muted greys.
description: Cold-season recolour and mood across the entire composition.

name: golden hour
steer: Bathe everything in warm late-afternoon golden-hour light: long raking shadows, glowing rim light, a hazy amber and rose palette, soft warm highlights on every surface.
description: Warm, low, directional sunlight with amber tones.

name: 1970s film look
steer: Render it as a grainy 1970s analog photograph: warm faded colours, gentle halation, soft contrast, slight vignetting and the muted earthy palette of aged Kodachrome.

name: film noir
steer: Turn it into high-contrast black-and-white film noir: hard chiaroscuro lighting, deep blacks, sharp shafts of light, dramatic shadows and a tense, moody atmosphere.

name: cyberpunk night
steer: Move it to a rain-slick cyberpunk night: glowing neon signage, magenta and cyan reflections on wet surfaces, volumetric haze and electric artificial light replacing daylight.

name: dreamy pastel
steer: Soften the whole image into a dreamy pastel illustration: gentle diffuse light, airy desaturated pastels, soft edges and a quiet, tender, storybook atmosphere.
description: Soft, light, gentle pastel palette and mood.

name: bold art movement
steer: Reinterpret the entire scene through a single bold art movement of your choice (e.g. art nouveau, ukiyo-e, art deco, expressionism) — commit fully to its line, palette and stylisation across every element.
description: Commit the whole caption to one strong art style.

name: stormy and dramatic
steer: Charge the scene with a dramatic storm: heavy clouds, raking stormlight, wind-driven motion, deep contrast and a brooding, high-energy atmosphere.
